PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Fetchik, Esq., via Zoom, for Lisa Jackson-Reeves, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers clarification regarding the decedent's parent's capacity and that his client has power of attorney for both parents. The court instructs counsel to file proof of power of attorney as well as confirmation of each parent's capacity from a doctor. The court and counsel discuss the bond issue and whether the court will consider a bond waiver. The court advises that it will consider waiving bond.

The subject matter is continued to Jan-24-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file the documents requested above by Jan-17-2024.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.
